title: Functional Core, Imperative Shell, and Production Integration · Changed-Stream Lab
summary: Rebuild an unreliable data-processing service as a pure decision core with explicit operational effects. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a production-shaped functional service and decision record with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate pure domain decisions from I/O orchestration with explicit data contracts.
Pass clocks, randomness, storage, and transport behavior through narrow callable interfaces.
Compose ingestion, validation, transformation, aggregation, and emission with bounded resource use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from collections.abc import Callable, Iterable, Iterator
from functools import partial, reduce
from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar('T')
U = TypeVar('U')

# Extend one pure, lazy, tested pipeline increment per activity.

steps.title: Commit to the mission model
steps.instruction:
lab case — A local decision core receives an injected clock and storage callable. Replaying the same 6-event fixture must reproduce decisions while I/O failures stay at the imperative boundary.
